title: The Civic Body Beneath

features.name: pipe-cathedral
features.desc-on-touch: concrete ducts stacked and branching, a geometry built to move water through the earth's buried veins. now it carries something else: signal, memory, the town's dream of itself.

features.name: glitch-pool
features.desc-on-touch: water or data pooling in a concrete basin, its surface fractured into errors. you see reflections of places that drain into this point.

features.name: breach-mouth
features.desc-on-touch: where the drain opens and the cool air breathes in and out. you remember entering through here, but the opening is also a mouth speaking.

features.name: signal-ring
features.desc-on-touch: flowing data or water spiralling in geometric rings, voices the town sent underground decades ago arriving in loops. they are still ringing.

features.name: sediment-record
features.desc-on-touch: layers of the town's runoff: leaves, plastic, hair, recordings the teenage walker left behind in a Dictaphone. the archive is reading sediment as file.

features.name: maintenance-glyph
features.desc-on-touch: markings on the concrete: numbers, arrows, dates where the city tried to keep track of its own plumbing. the marks are now speaking to each other.

inscription: the town keeps its secrets in its plumbing; the plumbing has begun answering

file.name: Stormwater_System_Survey_1994_And_The_Boy_Who_Walked_It.mp3
file.note: urban engineering document corrupted with overlaid audio: a teenager's breathing, footsteps, the sound of water and electronics meeting in the dark

exits.label: back out through the breach-mouth, toward the paddock where the dialling started
deeper into the main trunk, toward the city's arterial drain
upstream through the branching ducts, toward the rain's origin points
downstream into the darkness where signal fades and the archive stops following
